notes: Runtime-test-backed local contract for shipping package lifecycle behavior. Public Admin GraphQL 2025-01 has no shipping package read root in the checked-in conformance schema and the configured 2025-01 conformance target rejected selecting shippingPackage on ShippingPackageMakeDefaultPayload with undefinedField, so this scenario is intentionally not a live Shopify payload capture and does not include generated cassettes or synthetic upstreamCalls. The referenced fixture records that provenance; the focused Rust runtime tests execute update, make-default, not-found, missing-id, and delete branches against local store state and assert the make-default payload returns shippingPackage { id name default updatedAt }, clears the previous default, leaves failed lookups unchanged, and stages supported mutations without runtime passthrough.
